monoruby × ruby --yjit

Per-benchmark relative speed against ruby 4.0.1 --yjit, measured on every master push with Shopify/yjit-bench (--rss --harness=harness-warmup). Each benchmark process is bounded with timeout(1); benchmarks that crash or time out are listed in red with the cause. Source: latest.json, history.csv. Back to portal.

Latest snapshot

Benchmark monoruby (ms) YJIT (ms) YJIT / monoruby monoruby reason yjit reason
No benchmark data yet. The next master push will populate this page.
